response.justification: The candidate is an exceptionally strong technical match on paper — deep TypeScript/Node.js, React, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, GraphQL/REST, plus LLM and MCP/agentic tooling that hits every nice-to-have. The problem is fit to seniority: this is an entry-to-mid individual-contributor role and the applicant is a Staff/Senior engineer with 10+ years across web, mobile, and embedded. That mismatch raises real risks around salary expectations, retention, and motivation for a junior-scoped position. Worth a conversation to gauge genuine interest and the on-site requirement, but only if the team is open to a far more senior hire than advertised.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js + React with full-stack, clean-architecture and TDD focus
Hits nice-to-haves: AWS, Kubernetes/Docker, plus LLM and MCP/agentic tooling
Proven delivery across high-scale platforms and end-to-end product ownership
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry/mid-level IC role — retention and salary risk
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js (MongoDB/MySQL/SQL background instead)
On-site requirement vs. Berlin base needs clarifying; motivation for junior scope unclear
